atDirectives.name: @define-color
atDirectives.description: GTK CSS extension. Defines a named color, e.g. `@define-color accent #63b3ed;`, referenced later as `@accent`. Used by qbar/waybar themes.

atDirectives.name: @import
atDirectives.description: Pulls in another GTK CSS file, e.g. `@import url("base.css");`.

properties.name: min-width
properties.description: Minimum width of a workspace button / module.

properties.name: active-fill-color
properties.description: qbar: fill color of the active-workspace indicator.

properties.name: active-fill-opacity
properties.description: qbar: opacity (0..1) of the active-workspace fill.

properties.name: active-duration
properties.description: qbar: transition duration (ms) of the active-workspace indicator.

properties.name: active-easing
properties.description: qbar: easing curve name for the active-workspace transition.

properties.name: transition-duration
properties.description: qbar: transition duration (ms) for hover/state changes.

properties.name: transition-easing
properties.description: qbar: easing curve name (e.g. inoutquad, outcubic).

properties.name: hover-easing
properties.description: qbar: hover highlight easing curve name.

properties.name: animation-easing
properties.description: qbar: urgent-blink animation easing curve name.

properties.name: urgent-blink-color
properties.description: qbar: color of the urgent (attention) blink overlay.

properties.name: urgent-blink-opacity
properties.description: qbar: peak opacity (0..1) of the urgent blink.

properties.name: inset-highlight
properties.description: qbar: highlight color for a `box-shadow: inset` sunken bevel.

properties.name: background-image-opacity
properties.description: qbar: opacity (0..1) of a background-image layer.
